title: Bayer India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Bayer India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Bayer India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Bayer India:
Bayer India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bayer India!
